jobs.title: Senior SAP S/4HANA Consultant
jobs.description: Lead end-to-end SAP S/4HANA implementations across Finance, Supply Chain, and Manufacturing modules. Drive business process workshops, configure solutions, and own delivery quality from blueprint to go-live.

jobs.title: SAP ABAP Developer
jobs.description: Design and develop custom ABAP enhancements, BAdIs, user exits, and RESTful APIs for enterprise SAP environments. Work closely with functional consultants to translate business requirements into robust technical solutions.

jobs.title: Salesforce CRM Developer
jobs.description: Build and customise Salesforce Sales Cloud and Service Cloud solutions using Apex, LWC, and Flow. Deliver integrations with SAP and third-party platforms using MuleSoft and REST APIs.

jobs.title: Data & AI Engineer
jobs.description: Architect and build modern data platforms on AWS, Azure, and GCP. Develop AI-powered analytics solutions, ML pipelines, and real-time reporting dashboards for enterprise clients across multiple industries.

jobs.title: ERP Project Manager
jobs.description: Manage end-to-end delivery of complex ERP implementation programs. Drive scope, schedule, budget, and stakeholder communications across cross-functional teams for SAP, Oracle, and Microsoft Dynamics engagements.
